'''''Centax''-class heavy frigates''' were [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] used by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Centax''-class was armed with ten batteries of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and at least one vessel, the [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']], was also furnished with two batteries of [[MG1-A proton torpedo|MG1-A]] [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers. This class of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was known to be exceptionally fast considering its size.

==History==
Ships of this class were built by the shipwrights of [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] and outfitted on [[Centax-1/Legends|Centax-1]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Known ships==
*[[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']]

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
